title: campanula acutiloba
intro: Campanula acutiloba, also known as the East Asian bellflower, is a flowering plant native to China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Campanula acutiloba are said to include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
